task: Build a premium FrankX /mind page with generated visual system, 3D metaphor, motion restraint, and production QA.
audience: AI builders, AI Architects, technical creators, and founders using agents in serious work.
first_read: The human operator is the first operating system behind every AI workflow.
skill_route: premium visual design standards from the local estate

multi_agent_review.result: Reframed /mind as an operator-system page, not self-help. Required concrete system objects, no brains/faces/robots, diagnostic AI-as-mirror framing, and quiet signal-routing motion.
Required server metadata, NoSSR R3F route, capped DPR, reduced-motion fallback, static route generation, and existing FrankX link targets.

references.label: FrankX design.md
references.reason: Local FrankX colors, typography, and forbidden aesthetics.

references.label: FrankX taste.md
references.reason: Brand restraint, copy rules, no text animation, and image generation taste rules.

references.label: Premium Web OS
references.reason: Scene brief, asset provenance, WebGL fallback, and QA process.

references.label: Motion Design Studio
references.reason: Motion job, reduced-motion route, site integration, and taste critique.

keep: Obsidian command-layer surfaces with emerald and cyan signal lines.
Tactile cognitive workshop imagery: lenses, memory plates, architecture models, notes, and work surfaces.
Human presence through evidence of work rather than portraits.
Stable typography, calm spacing, and one signature visual metaphor.
avoid: Brains, heads, faces, robots, cute assistants, and generic neural orbs.
Spiritual, guru, clinical, or self-help language.
In-image text, fake UI, fake logos, fake charts, and warped hands.
Purple-blue SaaS fog, decorative gradients, and motion on readable text.
direction.signature: Mind Lattice: a quiet 3D operating diagram where attention, memory, taste, and review route noisy input into shipped systems.
system: Hero uses a full-bleed generated workbench image with stable copy over it.
All ten generated assets have prompt sidecars and specific page roles.
R3F scene is isolated, lazily loaded, DPR capped, and paired with a static fallback.
Reduced motion disables canvas animation and uses static explanatory states.

asset_quality.source_method: Codex native image generation fallback after Nano Banana CLI reported no Gemini API key
asset_quality.why_premium: The image system is custom art-directed for FrankX, has explicit page roles, avoids stock/AI cliches, carries one coherent material language, and was inspected in page context.

artifacts.notes: Static server route with metadata and OG image.
Responsive page composition, 10-image gallery, restrained copy, and no text motion.
Unframed R3F lattice, DPR capped at 1.5, no GLB, no postprocessing, preserveDrawingBuffer for QA.
10 generated PNG exports plus prompt sidecars and page spec.

artifacts.path_or_url: browser QA transcript for local production URL http://127.0.0.1:3107/mind
artifacts.notes: Screenshot files were generated locally for inspection and intentionally not committed to avoid repository bloat.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: All 10 image exports inspected for crop, artifacts, brand fit, no faces, no brains, no text, and coherent emerald/cyan command-layer style.

checks.name: type-check
checks.evidence: npm run type-check passed earlier in the final loop; final npm run build also completed TypeScript.

checks.name: lint
checks.evidence: npm run lint returned 0 errors. Existing warnings remain in unrelated files.

checks.name: design-check
checks.evidence: npm run design:check passed with the repo's existing design.md YAML warning.

checks.name: production-build
checks.evidence: npm run build passed. /mind generated as a static route.

checks.name: internal-links
checks.evidence: npm run links:check:static scanned 1999 files and all internal hrefs resolved.

checks.name: claims-audit
checks.evidence: npm run claims:audit:strict reported no high-risk claim patterns.

checks.name: ai-slop-audit
checks.evidence: npm run ai-slop:audit remains non-blocking with existing site-wide hits; no new /mind file hits were reported.

checks.name: browser-visual-qa
checks.evidence: Local production QA at 1440x1100 and 390x844 found 10 unique /images/mind files, zero broken mind images, one H1, seven sections, no horizontal overflow, nonblank canvas data lengths of 34678 and 30018, and zero canvases under reduced motion.

score.notes: Ships above the 26/30 gate. Strengths: coherent custom asset system, concrete operator thesis, restrained motion, responsive checks, and no generic self-help framing. Remaining risk: generated imagery used Codex native fallback because the preferred Nano Banana provider key was unavailable locally.

known_risks: Vercel production promotion should happen after the pushed branch/preview is verified.
The repository has existing non-blocking AI-slop audit hits outside this /mind change.
